languages.text: "...способный направлять их примитивные корабли сквозь варп. Конкретно этот, называемый Абеникусом Бенетеком, сумел теоретически сформулировать доводы о потенциальном существовании маршрута в этот сектор. Увы, достать образец живым не удалось, поэтому пришлось удовольствоваться останками..."

traits.locale_text: "Абеникус Бенетек. Представитель мутировавшей ветви Человечества, способный направлять их примитивные корабли сквозь эфир. Конкретно этот сумел теоретически сформулировать доводы о потенциальном существовании маршрута в этот сектор. Увы, достать образец живым не удалось, поэтому я удовольствовался телом".

languages.text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."
languages.original_text: "...способный направлять их примитивные корабли сквозь варп. Конкретно этот, называемый Абеникусом Бенетеком, сумел теоретически сформулировать доводы о потенциальном существовании маршрута в этот сектор. Увы, достать образец живым не удалось, поэтому пришлось удовольствоваться останками..."

traits.locale_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

"...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

"Abenicus Benetek. A member of a mutated branch of Humanity, capable of guiding their primitive ships through the Aether. This particular exemplar was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the body."

"...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

"...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

languages.text: “……能够引导他们那些粗陋的飞船穿越亚空间。这个名叫阿贝尼库斯·贝内特克的特殊样本，曾经推断出可能存在一条通往本星区的航路。可惜我没能获取活体样本，只好将就着收下这些残骸……”
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

traits.locale_text: “……能够引导他们那些粗陋的飞船穿越亚空间。这个名叫阿贝尼库斯·贝内特克的特殊样本，曾经推断出可能存在一条通往本星区的航路。可惜我没能获取活体样本，只好将就着收下这些残骸……”

languages.text: «... capaz de guiar sus rudimentarias naves por la disformidad. Este ejemplar concreto, de nombre Abenicus Benetek, fue capaz de teorizar la posible existencia de una ruta a este sector. Lamentablemente, no pude obtener vivo al espécimen y tuve que contentarme con sus restos...».
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

traits.locale_text: «... capaz de guiar sus rudimentarias naves por la disformidad. Este ejemplar concreto, de nombre Abenicus Benetek, fue capaz de teorizar la posible existencia de una ruta a este sector. Lamentablemente, no pude obtener vivo al espécimen y tuve que contentarme con sus restos...».

languages.text: « ... capable de guider ses vaisseaux rudimentaires à travers le Warp. Ce spécimen en particulier, qui répond au nom d'Abenicus Benetek, réussit à théoriser l'existence d'un itinéraire menant à ce secteur. Hélas, étant dans l'incapacité de faire l'acquisition d'un spécimen vivant, j'ai dû me contenter de ce corps. »
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

traits.locale_text: « ... capable de guider ses vaisseaux rudimentaires à travers le Warp. Ce spécimen en particulier, qui répond au nom d'Abenicus Benetek, réussit à théoriser l'existence d'un itinéraire menant à ce secteur. Hélas, étant dans l'incapacité de faire l'acquisition d'un spécimen vivant, j'ai dû me contenter de ce corps. »

languages.text: "İlkel gemilerini öteboyutta yönlendirebilir. Abenicus Benetek adındaki bu özel numune, bu sektöre giden bir rotanın olası var olabileceğini teorik olarak ortaya koyabilmişti. Ne yazık ki canlı numuneyi elde edemedim, bu yüzden kalıntılarla yetinmek zorunda kaldık..."
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

traits.locale_text: "İlkel gemilerini öteboyutta yönlendirebilir. Abenicus Benetek adındaki bu özel numune, bu sektöre giden bir rotanın olası var olabileceğini teorik olarak ortaya koyabilmişti. Ne yazık ki canlı numuneyi elde edemedim, bu yüzden kalıntılarla yetinmek zorunda kaldık..."

languages.text: "... in der Lage, ihre primitiven Schiffe durch den Warp zu lenken. Dieses besondere Exemplar namens Abenicus Benetek hat sogar eine Theorie hinsichtlich der möglichen Existenz einer Route in diesen Sektor aufgestellt. Da ich bedauerlicherweise kein lebendes Exemplar erwerben konnte, begnügte ich mich mit den Überresten ."
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."

traits.locale_text: "... in der Lage, ihre primitiven Schiffe durch den Warp zu lenken. Dieses besondere Exemplar namens Abenicus Benetek hat sogar eine Theorie hinsichtlich der möglichen Existenz einer Route in diesen Sektor aufgestellt. Da ich bedauerlicherweise kein lebendes Exemplar erwerben konnte, begnügte ich mich mit den Überresten ."

languages.text: "...粗末な船をワープ航行させる能力を持つ。この個体、アベニクス・ベネテックは、このセクターへのルートの存在を理論的に示した。残念ながら、生きた個体を手に入れることはできなかった。残骸に満足した..."
languages.original_text: "...capable of guiding their crude ships through the warp. This particular exemplar, named Abenicus Benetek, was able to theorise the potential existence of a route to this sector. Alas, I was unable to acquire a live specimen, so I contented myself with the remains..."
